bead.title: FEAT-005: add ddx doc list --type / ddx artifact list --media-type CLI subcommands
bead.description:
PROBLEM
FEAT-005's legacy->new migration table maps 'ddx adr list' -> 'ddx doc list --type ADR', but neither 'ddx doc list' nor 'ddx artifact list' exists, leaving the documented CLI migration path incomplete. The frontend /artifacts route and documents GraphQL resolver already provide listing/search (closed beads ddx-fbf57b89, ddx-5fb3b7cf, etc.), but the CLI surface FEAT-005 promises is missing.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-005-artifacts.md:266 documents 'ddx doc list --type <prefix>' / 'ddx artifact list --media-type <type>'; the migration table (~:373/:377) maps 'ddx adr list' -> 'ddx doc list --type ADR'. cli/cmd/doc.go has no 'list' subcommand (subcommands: graph/stale/stamp/show/deps/dependents/history/diff/changed/audit/migrate/prose/validate), and cli/cmd/artifact.go:39 exposes only 'regenerate'. No open bead tracks the CLI listing commands (2026-06-19 audit).

PROPOSED FIX
Add 'ddx doc list' (with --type <prefix> filter) and 'ddx artifact list' (with --media-type <type> filter), reading from the same document/artifact graph the server resolver uses, with --json output. Wire the legacy 'ddx adr list'-style aliases to redirect per the FEAT-005 migration table.

NON-SCOPE
Do not change the frontend /artifacts route or the documents GraphQL resolver. Do not add search beyond the documented --type/--media-type filters (full-text search is ddx-4a7eed8c).
bead.acceptance:
1. 'ddx doc list --type ADR --json' lists ADR documents from the doc graph; TestDocListByType covers it against a fixture repo.
2. 'ddx artifact list --media-type <type> --json' lists artifacts filtered by media-type; TestArtifactListByMediaType covers it.
3. The legacy 'ddx adr list' migration path documented in FEAT-005 resolves (redirect or alias) to 'ddx doc list --type ADR'.
4. cd cli && go test ./cmd/... green.
5. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
